pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh, which launches ProjectLibre with this exact file path.
Verified by reading export_result.sh, which sets this path as OUTPUT_PATH, and verifier.py which evaluates the file retrieved from this path.

Contradicted by the actual contents of the loaded project file. The task environment provides a 'Commercial Construction' template (copied from assets/sample_project.xml) that contains zero milestones. The intended texts are only present in the synthetic data generated by create_sample_project.py, which the setup script fails to execute.

Contradicted by the actual contents of the loaded project file. These standard task names belong to the generated 'Enterprise Software Development Project' which is missing from the environment. The actual loaded 'Commercial Construction' file does not contain them.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructs the agent to filter an 'Enterprise Software Development Project' to show only milestones. However, the task setup script loads an unrelated 'Commercial Construction' template file that contains zero milestones and none of the intended task names. Consequently, the required and forbidden text claims in the metadata are contradicted by the actual data provided to the agent.
